reasoning: With the knowledge cutoff at November 9, 2025, there are only 52 days remaining in the year to deploy forces. The Coalition of the Willing was formed to support a potential peace deal, but there is no indication in the background information that a ceasefire or peace settlement has been reached. A reassurance force of 15,000-20,000 personnel would require immense logistical coordination, typically taking months to execute after a political agreement is finalized. Furthermore, the background notes that efforts are actively shifting away from direct troop deployment toward alternative arrangements due to logistical constraints, political constraints, and stiff opposition from both the US and Russia. Without an established peace agreement and with the expressed shift away from troop deployments, the likelihood of a multinational military deployment into Ukraine before the end of 2025 is exceedingly low.
